productDisplayName: Puma Men Blue Polo Neck T-shirt
description: Style NoteThe German brand puma is known world over for their infusion of colour and minimalist styling into classic wardrobe staples. With its fine finishing and detailing this Polo neck T-shirt easily makes it to our wishlist for the Summer. Pair it with distressed denims and flip-flops for a rugged look or with track pants and sneakers for a workout.Product DetailsBlue polo neck T-shirt, pique knit, grey ribbed spread collar, short buttoned placket with overlock details, short sleeves with grey ribbed cuff, branding embroidered on left front chest, brand badge on left hem, branding at back neck, vented hem Materials and Care100% cottonWash and iron inside outMachine wash warm Warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model(height 6'and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
